resources.string: The app could not load xg2g right now.
The xg2g host could not be resolved. Check DNS and the configured host name.
The app could not connect to xg2g. Check whether the server is reachable.
The connection to xg2g timed out. Try again in a moment.
The server is rate limiting requests right now. Try again shortly.
Android rejected the TLS certificate for %1$s. Check that the certificate is valid and trusted on this device.
